{{- /*
  LeapMux override of Hextra's llms.txt (vendored from hextra@v0.12.3).
  Re-sync if the theme module is bumped. LeapMux change: each entry uses the
  page's hand-written `description` front matter (a complete, purpose-built
  one-liner) instead of the auto-summary truncated to 100 chars, which cut
  mid-sentence. Falls back to a 200-char-truncated summary for pages without one.
*/ -}}
# {{ .Site.Title }}

> {{ .Site.Params.description | default "" }}

{{ range where site.Sections "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
{{- template "llms-section-tree" dict "context" . "level" 2 }}
{{ end }}

{{- $rootPages := where (where site.RegularPages "Section" "") "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
{{- if $rootPages }}
## Root Pages
{{- range $rootPages }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }}): {{ with .Description }}{{ . }}{{ else }}{{ .Summary | plainify | truncate 200 | strings.TrimSpace }}{{ end }}{{ if .Date }} - Published {{ .Date.Format "2006-01-02" }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
Generated on {{ now.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05 UTC" }}
Site: {{ .Site.BaseURL }}

{{- define "llms-section-tree" -}}
{{- $context := .context -}}
{{- $level := .level | default 2 -}}
{{- $headerHashes := strings.Repeat $level "#" -}}
{{- "\n" -}}
{{ $headerHashes }} {{ $context.Title }}

{{- range where $context.RegularPages "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }}): {{ with .Description }}{{ . }}{{ else }}{{ .Summary | plainify | truncate 200 | strings.TrimSpace }}{{ end }}{{ if .Date }} - Published {{ .Date.Format "2006-01-02" }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}

{{- range where $context.Sections "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
{{ template "llms-section-tree" dict "context" . "level" (add $level 1) }}
{{- end }}
{{- end -}}
